title: accurate story mode blocks
description: this is a resource pack project I'm working on, that makes the blocks and items we know, into the 3D models story mode has, this may have some bugs as it's a W.I.P
body:
this is a resource pack deticated to make the blocks in minecraft look like the 3D blocks you see in story mode, i will try to update it as much as i can, i even have planned to port this to 1.20.1 to be playable with crackers witherstorm mod for story mode immersion.
currently is stuck at 1.12.2
